subcodes.first_line: O Lord! This bird hath winged its flight unto the meadows of Thy forgiveness and pardon, and this breeze hath returned to the garden of Thy grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم ان هذا طیر طار الی ریاض عفوک و مغفرتک و هذا نسیم قد رجع الی حدیقه فضلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @eulogies; reminiscences
